title: crotalaria lebrunii
intro: Crotalaria lebrunii, also known as Lebrun's crotalaria, is a plant species belonging to the legume family. Traditionally, the plant is used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antimalarial activities. The health benefits associated with Crotalaria lebrunii include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support immune system function. Herbal preparations of the plant are often made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are used to treat various ailments, although further research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety.
